name: spotify-search
description: Search the Spotify catalog for tracks, artists, albums, or playlists. Use for questions like 'find albums by Radiohead', 'search for jazz piano tracks', 'look up the artist Bicep', 'find the song Karma Police'. Returns matching results from Spotify's full catalog.

input.description: q is the search query (required). type is comma-separated resource types: track, artist, album, playlist (default: track,artist). limit is result count per type, max 10 (default: 5).

type.description: Comma-separated types: track, artist, album, playlist (default: track,artist)

limit.description: Number of results per type, 1-10 (default: 5). Do not exceed 10.

output.description: Search results with keys matching requested types (tracks, artists, albums, playlists). Each contains an items array with name, ID, and type-specific fields.
